name: Prime Mining Corp.
description: Prime Mining Corp. was a Canadian-based precious metals company primarily focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral resource properties. Its flagship asset was the Los Reyes Gold-Silver Project located in Mexico. The company was dedicated to advancing this project through exploration and development to unlock its full potential. Prime Mining Corp. was headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, and its common shares were traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol PRYM until the company was acquired by Torex Gold Resources Inc.
